intro: Peyritschia tolucensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, native to Mexico. The health benefits of Peyritschia tolucensis include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues, including infections and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
